strings.en: Elemento builds the Metacloud: a sovereign control plane that enables organisations to govern, migrate and procure infrastructure through intent and portable contracts, without lock-in.
Building trust through robust security measures and compliance with industry standards and regulations.
Working closely with our customers to understand their needs and provide tailored solutions that drive success.
The experts behind Elemento's innovative cloud platform
Milestones and equity history aligned with our public profile on Crunchbase (founded 2021, headquartered in Cuneo, Italy).

Elemento Modular Cloud is established as an Italian startup in Cuneo, Piedmont—with a mission to make advanced private and public cloud infrastructure approachable while keeping data firmly under customer control. Explore our product lineup and technology story .

We concentrate engineering on the Elemento stack: a modular data-and-compute architecture, intuitive proprietary software, and AtomOS -driven on-premise and appliance deployments—so organizations can run cloud-grade stacks without hyperscaler lock-in.

We sharpen go-to-market around high-impact trajectories called out in innovation-cluster and ecosystem profiles: IoT, AI, blockchain & Web3, advanced computing, and polished UX—spanning smart infrastructure, industry, fintech, healthcare, education, and digital public services.

We close our seed financing (March 2024), with Fin+Tech as lead investor and additional institutional participation; round size is summarized on aggregators and on Crunchbase . Our commercial model—hardware and software, support plans, and network resource exchange—scales alongside that capital. Open engineering continues on GitHub .

We were named among the 18 finalists of the Italian Master Startup Award (IMSA) 2025 , presented during Italian Tech Week in Turin (October 2025). Press coverage highlighted enterprise traction, collaboration with partners such as Dell Technologies , participation in the NVIDIA Inception program, and support from CDP and the Fin+Tech accelerator.

We extend federation, automation, and sustainable compute : deeper multi-cloud and hybrid operations, broader partner and provider integrations, and the next wave of security and orchestration—so customers keep full data ownership without hyperscaler lock-in. Updated funding and company facts remain on Crunchbase .

At Elemento , we believe infrastructure should remain where it is, workloads should run where they make the most sense, and governance should be decoupled from infrastructure ownership. Our vision: a world where infrastructure is as open and interoperable as the Internet. Explore the Metacloud platform and our control plane .
Ready to transform your infrastructure with Elemento? Let's build the future of cloud computing together.

We're building the future of cloud computing - one that prioritizes performance , cost-effectiveness , and sustainability without compromising on enterprise-grade security and reliability. Read about our latest innovations on our blog and get in touch to learn more.
Pioneering the next generation of cloud infrastructure with cutting-edge technology and sustainable practices. Discover our technical innovations and product capabilities .
The principles that guide everything we do at Elemento
We believe in vendor neutrality and giving organizations complete control over their infrastructure. No lock-in, no restrictions.
Making cloud computing affordable for organizations of all sizes through intelligent optimization and transparent pricing.
Committed to reducing the environmental impact of cloud computing through green technology and energy optimization.
Delivering enterprise-grade performance and reliability without compromising on speed or scalability.
Elemento builds the Metacloud: a sovereign control plane that enables organisations to govern, migrate and procure infrastructure through intent and portable contracts, without lock-in.
Learn about Elemento's mission to transform cloud infrastructure with vendor-neutral, cost-effective, and green computing solutions.
